sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93080" key="sakki/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σακκ-ίας</orth> (or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σακίας</orth>) <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἶνος</foreign>, <sense id="n93080.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strained</tr_> wine, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
